## Checklist

- [ ] Visual regression checked (compare before/after screenshots)
- [ ] Performance tiers tested: **Full**, **Mid**, **Low** (via Settings → Performance mode)
- [ ] Responsive tested: desktop / tablet / mobile
- [ ] No new npm packages added
- [ ] CSS variable names used match existing `var(--...)` references in App.jsx
- [ ] No hardcoded colors outside `:root` variables (unless spec-mandated)
- [ ] `[data-perf="low"]` and `[data-perf="mid"]` rules updated if new effects added

## Performance impact notes

_Describe any new animations, backdrop-filters, box-shadows, or will-change usage added._
